name: Baked Oysters
recipeInstructions:
1. Shuck the oysters and drain them, reserving half of the shells.
2. In a bowl, combine parsley, garlic, Worcestershire sauce, clam juice, and chili sauce with 6 tablespoons melted butter. Mix well.
3. Dip each oyster into the sauce and place in a shell on a baking pan.
4. Spoon any remaining sauce over the oysters.
5. Sprinkle a teaspoon of chopped mushrooms on each oyster.
6. Combine the Parmesan cheese and bread crumbs, then sprinkle over the oysters.
7. Dribble the remaining butter over the oysters.
8. Bake at 400 degrees for 15 minutes.
